fields.question_text: What type of accommodation do you live in?
Do you own or rent the accommodation that you live in?
How many years have you lived at your current address?

Including yourself, how many people are living together in your household? (Include those who usually live in the house such as students living away from home during term, partners in the armed forces or professions such as pilots)
How many cars or vans are owned, or available for use, by you or members of your household? (Please include company vehicles if available for private use)
What is the average total income before tax received by your HOUSEHOLD?
How many years have you worked in your current job? (If you have more than one job please answer this, and the following questions on work, for your MAIN job only)
In a typical WEEK, how many hours do you spend at work?(Do not include hours travelling to and from work)
How many times a WEEK do you travel from home to your main work? (count outward journeys only; put 0 if you always work from home)
About how many miles is it between your home and your work?
Does your work involve walking or standing for most of the time?
Does your work involve heavy manual or physical work?
Does your work involve shift work?
At what age did you complete your continuous full-time education? Enter age in years. If you never attended school, enter -2.

In a typical WEEK, on how many days did you walk for at least 10 minutes
at a time?
(Include walking that you do at work, travelling to and from
work, and for sport or leisure)
How many minutes did you usually spend walking on a typical DAY?
How many minutes did you usually spend doing moderate activities on a typical DAY?

In a typical WEEK, how many days did you do 10 minutes or more of vigorous physical activity?
(These are activities that make you sweat
or breathe hard such as fast cycling, aerobics, heavy lifting)
How many minutes did you usually spend doing vigorous activities on a typical DAY?
How would you describe your usual walking pace?
At home, during the last 4 weeks, about how many times a DAY do you climb a flight of stairs? (approx 10 steps)
How many times in the last 4 weeks did you go walking for pleasure?
Each time you went walking for pleasure, about how long did you spend doing it?
How many times in the last 4 weeks did you do strenuous sports?
Each time you did strenuous sports, about how long did you spend doing it?
How many times in the last 4 weeks did you do light DIY?
Each time you did light DIY, about how long did you spend doing it?
How often do you visit friends or family or have them visit you?
In a typical DAY in summer, how many hours do you spend outdoors?
In a typical DAY in winter, how many hours do you spend outdoors?

In a typical DAY, how many hours do you spend watching TV?
(Put 0 if you do not spend any time doing it)
In a typical DAY, how many hours do you spend driving?
How often do you drive faster than the speed limit on the motorway?
For approximately how many years have you been using a mobile phone at least once per week to make or receive calls?
Over the last 3 months, on average how much time per week did you spend making or receiving calls on a mobile phone?
Over the last 3 months, how often have you used a hands-free device/speakerphone when making or receiving calls on your mobile?
Is there any difference between your mobile phone use now compared to two years ago?
On what side of the head do you usually use a mobile phone?
On an average day, how easy do you find getting up in the morning?
Do you consider yourself to be?
Do you have a nap during the day?
Do you have trouble falling asleep at night or do you wake up in the middle of the night?
Does your partner or a close relative or friend complain about your snoring?
How likely are you to doze off or fall asleep during the daytime when you don't mean to? (e.g. when working, reading or driving)
Do you smoke tobacco now?
In the past, how often have you smoked tobacco?
Does anyone in your household smoke?
At home, about how many hours per WEEK are you exposed to other people's tobacco smoke?
Outside of your home, about how many hours per WEEK are you exposed to other people's tobacco smoke?

On average how many heaped tablespoons of COOKED vegetables would you eat per DAY?
(Do not include potatoes; put '0' if you do not eat any)
On average how many heaped tablespoons of SALAD or RAW vegetables would you eat per DAY?(Include lettuce, tomato in sandwiches; put '0' if you do not eat any)

About how many pieces of FRESH fruit would you eat per DAY?
(Count one apple, one banana, 10 grapes etc as one piece; put '0' if you do not eat any)

About how many pieces of DRIED fruit would you eat per DAY?
(Count one prune, one dried apricot, 10 raisins as one piece; put '0' if you do not eat any)

How often do you eat oily fish?
(e.g. sardines, salmon, mackerel, herring)
How often do you eat other types of fish? (e.g. cod, tinned tuna, haddock)
How often do you eat processed meats (such as bacon, ham, sausages, meat pies, kebabs, burgers, chicken nuggets)?

How often do you eat chicken, turkey or other poultry?
(Do not count processed meats)
How often do you eat beef? (Do not count processed meats)
How often do you eat lamb/mutton? (Do not count processed meats)

How often do you eat pork?
(Do not count processed meats such as bacon or ham)

How often do you eat cheese?
(Include cheese in pizzas, quiches, cheese sauce etc)
What type of milk do you mainly use?
What type of spread do you mainly use?
How many slices of bread do you eat each WEEK?
What type of bread do you mainly eat?
How many bowls of cereal do you eat a WEEK?
What type of cereal do you mainly eat?

Do you add salt to your food?
(Do not include salt used in cooking)
How many cups of tea do you drink each DAY?(Include black and green tea)

How many cups of coffee do you drink each DAY?
(Include decaffeinated coffee)
What type of coffee do you usually drink?
How do you like your hot drinks? (Such as coffee or tea)
How many glasses of water do you drink each DAY?
Have you made any major changes to your diet in the last 5 years?
Does your diet vary much from week to week?
About how often do you drink alcohol?
In an average WEEK, how many glasses of RED wine would you drink?(There are six glasses in an average bottle)

In an average WEEK, how many glasses of WHITE wine or champagne would you drink?
(There are six glasses in an average bottle)

In an average WEEK, how many pints of beer or cider would you drink?
(Include bitter, lager, stout, ale, Guinness)

In an average WEEK, how many measures of spirits or liqueurs
would you drink?
(there are 25 standard measures in a normal sized bottle; spirits include drinks such as whisky, gin, rum, vodka, brandy)

In an average WEEK, how many glasses of fortified wine would you drink?
(There are 12 glasses in an average bottle; Fortified wines include drinks such as
sherry, port, vermouth)
When you drink alcohol is it usually with meals?
Compared to 10 years ago, do you drink?
When you were 10 years old, compared to average would you describe yourself as:
When you were 10 years old, compared to average would you describe yourself as:
Are you right or left handed?
What best describes the colour of your skin without tanning?
What would happen to your skin if it was repeatedly exposed to bright sunlight without any protection?

What best describes your natural hair colour?
(If your hair colour is grey, the colour before you went grey)
Do people say that you look:
Are you a twin, triplet or other multiple birth?
Did your mother smoke regularly around the time when you were born?
Is your father still alive?
What was his age when he died?
Is your mother still alive?
What is her age now?

How many brothers do you have? (Please include those who have died, and twin brothers. Do not include half- brothers, step-brothers or
adopted brothers)

How many sisters do you have?
(Please include those who have died, and twin sisters. Do not include half-sisters, step-sisters or adopted sisters)
Does your mood often go up and down?
Are you an irritable person?
Do you often feel 'fed-up'?
Would you call yourself tense or 'highly strung'?
Do you worry too long after an embarrassing experience?
Do you suffer from 'nerves'?
Do you often feel lonely?
Would you describe yourself as someone who takes risks?
Over the past two weeks, how often have you felt down, depressed or hopeless?
Over the past two weeks, how often have you had little interest or pleasure in doing things?
Over the past two weeks, how often have you felt tense, fidgety or restless?
Over the past two weeks, how often have you felt tired or had little energy?
Have you ever seen a general practitioner (GP) for nerves, anxiety, tension or depression?
Have you ever seen a psychiatrist for nerves, anxiety, tension or depression?
How often are you able to confide in someone close to you?

The next section contains questions about your sexual history.
If you feel that a question is too sensitive,
you can skip the question or skip the entire section if you prefer.

What was your age when you first had sexual intercourse?
(Sexual intercourse includes vaginal, oral or anal intercourse)
About how many sexual partners have you had in your lifetime?
In general how would you rate your overall health?

Do you have any long-standing illness, disability or
infirmity?
Do you wear glasses or contact lenses to correct your vision?
What age did you first start to wear glasses or contact lenses?
Do you play computer games?
Do you have any difficulty with your hearing?
Do you find it difficult to follow a conversation if there is background noise (such as TV, radio, children playing)?
Do you wear sun protection (e.g. sunscreen lotion, hat) when you spend time outdoors in the summer?
How many times a year would you use a solarium or sunlamp?
In the last year have you had any falls?
Compared with one year ago, has your weight changed?
In the last year have you ever had wheeze or whistling in the chest?
Do you ever have any pain or discomfort in your chest?

Have you ever had a screening test for bowel (colorectal) cancer?
(Please include tests for blood in the stool/faeces or a colonoscopy or a sigmoidoscopy)
How many years ago was the most recent one of these tests?
When did you start to grow facial hair?
When did your voice break?
Which of the following best describes your hair/balding pattern?
How many children have you fathered?
Have you had any major operations? (For example, operations that required an overnight stay in hospital)
Has a doctor ever told you that you have diabetes?
Has a doctor ever told you that you have had cancer?
Have you fractured/broken any bones in the last 5 years?
Has a doctor ever told you that you have had any other serious medical conditions or disabilities?

Do you regularly take any other PRESCRIPTION medications?
(Do not forget medications such as puffers or patches)
How many times in the last 4 weeks did you do heavy DIY?
Each time you did heavy DIY, about how long did you spend doing it?
In your lifetime, have you smoked a total of at least 100 times?
What type of spread do you mainly use?
Why did you reduce the amount you drank?
Have you ever been for breast cancer screening (a mammogram)?
How many years ago was your last screen?
Have you ever had a cervical smear test?
How many years ago was your last cervical smear test?
How old were you when your periods started?
Have you had your menopause (periods stopped)?

How many children have you given birth to?
(Please include live births only)
What was the birth weight of your first child in pounds?(do not include twins)
How old were you when you had your FIRST child?
How old were you when you had your LAST child?
Have you ever had any stillbirths, spontaneous miscarriages or terminations?
Have you ever taken the contraceptive pill? (include the 'mini-pill')
About how old were you when you first went on the contraceptive pill?
How old were you when you last used the contraceptive pill?
Have you ever used hormone replacement therapy (HRT)?
How old were you when you had your hysterectomy?
Have you had BOTH ovaries removed?
How old were you when you first started smoking on most days?
What type of tobacco did you usually smoke?
About how many cigarettes did you smoke on average each day?
How old were you when you last smoked on most days?
In the time that you smoked, did you ever stop for more than 6 months?
How many times did you try to give up smoking before you were successful?
Do you think you may start smoking again?
What is his age now?
Have you had pains all over the body for more than 3 months?
What was your age when the high blood pressure was first diagnosed?
What was your age when the diabetes was first diagnosed?
Did you start insulin within one year of your diagnosis of diabetes?
Did the fracture result from a simple fall (i.e. from standing height)?
Do you use a hearing aid most of the time?
Have you had neck or shoulder pains for more than 3 months?
Have you had hip pains for more than 3 months?
Does your work involve night shifts?
How old were you when you first started smoking on most days?
What type of tobacco do you mainly smoke?
About how many cigarettes did you smoke on average each day?
How soon after waking do you smoke your first cigarette of the day?
How easy or difficult would you find it to go without smoking for a whole day?
Have you tried to give up smoking?
Do you want to stop smoking?
Compared to 10 years ago do you smoke...
What was her age when she died?
How old were you when you last used HRT?
Have you had back pains for more than 3 months?
How old were you when your periods stopped?
Have you had a hysterectomy (womb removed)?
Do you get this pain or discomfort when you walk at an ordinary pace on the level?
Does this chest pain go away when you stand still?
What was your age when the angina was first diagnosed?
How many times in the last 4 weeks did you do other exercises such as swimming, cycling, keep fit?
Each time you did other exercises such as swimming, cycling, keep fit, about how long did you spend doing them?
What year did you first come to live in the United Kingdom?
How many days since your last menstrual period?
How many days is your usual menstrual cycle?(The number of days between each menstrual period)

Are you menstruating today?
(We are asking this as it may affect the urine sample that you have been asked to provide)
Did you previously drink alcohol?
Have you had stomach or abdominal pains for more than 3 months?
Do you get this pain or discomfort when you walk uphill or hurry?
What was your age when the hayfever, rhinitis or eczema was first diagnosed?
Have you had knee pains for more than 3 months?
What was your age when the asthma was first diagnosed?
Have you had headaches for more than 3 months?
How many years ago was your last test?
How many stillbirths? (enter 0 if none)
How many spontaneous miscarriages? (enter 0 if none)
How many terminations? (enter 0 if none)
Why did you stop drinking alcohol?
How old were you when you had your child?
What was your age when the heart attack was first diagnosed?
Is your ADOPTED father still alive?
Is your ADOPTED mother still alive?
What was your age when the emphysema/chronic bronchitis was first diagnosed?
What was your age when the blood clot in the leg (DVT) was first diagnosed?
What was your age when the blood clot in the lung was first diagnosed?
Did you only have diabetes during pregnancy?
What was your age when the stroke was first diagnosed?
Have you had facial pains for more than 3 months?
In an average MONTH, how many pints of beer or cider would you drink?(Include bitter, lager, stout, ale, Guinness)
In an average MONTH, how many glasses of fortified wine would you drink?(There are 12 glasses in an average bottle)(Fortified wines include drinks such as sherry, port, vermouth)
In an average MONTH, how many glasses of other alcoholic drinks (such as alcopops) would you drink?
Did you previously smoke cigarettes on most or all days?

Which of the following qualifications do you have?
(You can select more than one)
Do you have any of the following in your home? (You can select more than one answer)
How are the other people who live with you related to you? (You can select more than one answer)
Which of the following describes your current situation? (You can select more than one answer)
What types of transport do you use to get to and from work? (You can select more than one answer)
Which of the following do you NEVER eat?(You can select more than one answer)

In the last 2 years have you experienced any of the following?
(You can select more than one answer)
Do you receive any of the following? (You can select more than one answer)
Do you have any of the following? (You can select more than one answer)
Has a doctor ever told you that you have had any of the following conditions? (You can select more than one answer)
Which bones did you fracture/break? (You can select more than one answer)
Has a doctor ever told you that you have had any of the following conditions? (You can select more than one answer)
Do you regularly take any of the following? (You can select more than one answer)
Do you regularly take any of the following? (You can select more than one answer)

Why did you stop smoking?
(You can select more than one answer)
Why did you reduce your smoking? (You can select more than one answer)

In the last month have you experienced any of the following that interfered with your usual activities?
(You can select more than one answer)

Which of the following do you attend once a week or more often?
(You can select more than one)

In the last 4 weeks, which forms of transport have you used most often to get about?
(Not including any journeys to and from work; you can select more than one answer)

In the last 4 weeks did you spend any time doing the following?
(You can select more than one answer)
Do you regularly take any of the following medications? (you can select more than one answer)
Do you regularly take any of the following? (You can select more than one answer)
About how many cigarettes do you smoke on average each day?
How old were you when you last smoked cigarettes on most days?
Has/did your father ever suffer from? (You can select more than one answer)
Has/did your mother ever suffer from? (You can select more than one answer)

Have any of your brothers or sisters suffered from any of the following illnesses?
(You can select more than one answer)

Has/did your ADOPTED mother ever suffer from?
(You can select more than one answer)

Have any of your ADOPTED brothers or sisters suffered from any of the following illnesses?
(You can select more than one answer)
Current Field is partly derived from S1 & S2
Current Field is partly derived from A1 & A1A
What is your ethnic group?
What is your age in years at the time of this test?
